allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''main:'''', d.get\(''''main''''\)\); print\(''''module:'''', d.get\(''''module''''\)\); print\(''''exports:'''', json.dumps\(d.get\(''''exports'''',''''none''''\), indent=2\)[:500]\)")

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | sed -n 's/.*"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'); case "$FILE" in *settings.local.json|*settings.json|*.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCKED: This file may contain secrets. Do not read it.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; exit 0

ls process/collaboration/locks/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v locks.md | head -5 | while read f; do echo "ACTIVE LOCK: $(cat process/collaboration/locks/$f)" >&2; done; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: Check process/collaboration/locks/ for active locks. Files covered by a lock may change while you read them."}}'

ls process/collaboration/locks/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v locks.md | head -5 | while read f; do echo "ACTIVE LOCK: $(cat process/collaboration/locks/$f)" >&2; done; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: Before writing, check process/collaboration/locks/ for conflicts. You must add a lock file before writing and remove it when done. See process/collaboration/collaboration.md for the format."}}'
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts) npm run ci --silent 2>&1 | tail -5;; esac; }
